JBQ Test Bank

Beginner verses 1–169 and Junior verses 1–267. Official quiz mode uses 15 questions with 6×10 point, 6×20 point, and 3×30 point questions. Incorrect answers lose half the point value.

Quiz Controls

The selected division caps the maximum verse sequence automatically.
